name: Webnode
summary: Operate web node publishing/status workflows through URI routes.
description: Webnode is an if-uri urirun connector for operate web node publishing/status workflows through URI routes. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Webnode capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use webnode:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
